children.name: California's oldest state park set to reopen July 22, two years after devastating fire

Sparked by multiple lightning strikes on Aug. 16, 2020, the CZU Lightning Complex Fire burned 86,509 acres, an area nearly three times the size of the city of San Francisco, in rural Santa Cruz and San Mateo counties.. It burned 97% of Big Basin Redwoods State Park, California’s oldest state park, which is set to reopen on July 22, 2022. (Photo: Big Basin, the History of Fire, Mountain Parks Foundation)

children.name: Santa Cruz surfer Nat Young falls to Brazil’s Italo Ferreira in Round of 16 in South Africa

Santa Cruz's Nat Young bested No. 1 ranked Filipe Toledo of Brazil into the Opening Round of the World Surf League's Corona Open J-Bay on Wednesday in Eastern Cape, South Africa. On Thursday, No. 3 Italo Ferreira of Brazil -- the 2019 World Champion -- made sure he didn't endure a similar fate.
